description.para: Below macros gives QSPI, QSPIPSU base address.
QSPIPSU Enable Register
This register contains bits for configuring GQSPI controller
This register contains bits for configuring LQSPI

briefdescription.para: Mode value for dual I/O or quad I/O.

description.para: QSPIPSU Interrupt Status Register
This register bits for enabling interrupts
This register bits for disabling interrupts
This register bits for masking interrupts
This register bits for enabling QSPI controller
This register bits for configuring TXFIFO
This register bits for configuring RXFIFO
This register bits for configuring TX/RX Threshold

sectiondef.header: XQSPIPSU Loopback Master Clock Delay Adjustment Register information

description.para: This register contains bits for configuring loopback
This register contains bits for configuring GENFIFO
This register contains bits for selection GQSPI/LQSPI controller
This register contains bits for controlling TXFIFO and RXFIFO
This register contains bits for configuring GENFIFO threshold
This register contains bits for configuring Poll feature
This register contains bits for transfer status
This register contains bits for configuring GENFIFO

sectiondef.header: XQSPIPSU Receive Data Copy Register information

description.para: This register contains bits for configuring DMA
Generic FIFO masks information

sectiondef.header: XQSPIPSU RX Data Delay Register information

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XQspiPsu_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress. s32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XQspiPsu_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, s32 RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)XQSPIPSU_H

briefdescription.para: The xqspipsu_hw.h contains low level access functions using the base address directly without an instance.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes -- ----- --------------------------------------------. 1.0 hk 08/21/14 First release hk 03/18/15 Add DMA status register masks required. sk 04/24/15 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 1.2 nsk 07/01/16 Added LQSPI supported Masks rk 07/15/16 Added support for TapDelays at different frequencies. 1.7 tjs 03/14/18 Added support in EL1 NS mode. 1.9 tjs 04/17/18 Updated register addresses as per the latest revision of versal (CR#999610) 1.9 aru 01/17/19 Fixed the violations for MISRAC-2012 in safety mode .Done changes such as added U suffix 1.11 akm 11/07/19 Removed LQSPI register access in Versal. 1.15 akm 12/02/21 Fix Doxygen warnings.
